industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Atlantic Power & Infrastructure Corp.
summary: Atlantic Wind & Solar, Inc. offers porous paving solution in Florida. The company offers solution, such as drainage, erosion, landscaping, trails and paths, and tree surrounds. Atlantic Wind & Solar, Inc. formerly known as K.B. Industries, Inc. and changed its name to Atlantic Wind & Solar, Inc. on Jun, 2019. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Largo, Florida.
